name: The Quarter Silom by UHG
detail: Me and my GF decided to change the hotels everyday while we were visiting Bangkok. After we came to the Quater Silom we stopped moving to the other places. Really great place with a perfect location and kind staff. Would come and stay here again! Thanks to the management and to everyone who make this place to be as it is! 🙏

name: Buddy Lodge Hotel
detail: The room was extremely comfortable and nicely decorated

name: Pullman Bangkok Hotel G
detail: I am a visitor from Hong Kong and stay at Pullman Hotel G. Yesterday was my first day to check in to the hotel, Unfortunately I found my luggage was wrongly pick up at the airport. I was feeling lost and don't know what to do at that moment cause me and my girl friend doesn't speak Thai-language, also I don't even have a contact of my airline. So I went back to the lobby and looking for HELP. One of your staff which stay at Bell Captain side call Ping heard my situation and started help me to found out the number of the airline and talk with them about my issue. After all the conversation done, Ping suggest me to take the wrong luggage back to airport first and let BFS to handle my case. While we sent back the luggage and go to travel around, it was mid-night when we back to hotel. Another Bell Captain JoJo was there and I was asked for help to tracking my case. It was 8 hours later since I sent back the luggage and seems no luck on it as JoJo mention after he help to call the BFS. JoJo said he will stay connect with the BFS and let me know any update if need. Finally, BFS call me one hour later and said mine luggage was back to the airport and will sent back to the hotel I live! The next day I go back to Bell Captain, NJ saw my letter which provide by the hotel and already know what am I think of. My luggage is back! It's really amazing on all of you guys which help me on this ultimate-scared case and I think the training and the empathy of your staff are very well. I will recommend all my friend who will be BangKoK to travel to come to Pullman Bangkok Hotel G ! Also, a concierge staff call OFF also help us to contact the Van we book cause the time on my booking time is complicated. Thanks for his help too. Finally, i was received a cheat call from bangkok, thanks for your staff GAM to help me translate and let them know we are not worth to cheat. Again, thank you so much for all of your staff which helps.

name: Grande Centre Point Surawong Bangkok
detail: One of the standout features of the hotel is its facilities.

name: Mercure Bangkok Sukhumvit 11
detail: Pros: 1. Super fast check in and check out (done in less than 10 minutes) 2. Spacious room for 2 adults and a kid with a 2-seats comfy sofa, work desk and chair, enough pillows and large bed! 3. Right in the middle of hustling soi 11, but rooms are quiet. You only feel it once you get out on the streets. 4. Accommodated all special requests made while booking. 5. Housekeeping was on point! Even organized our clothes that were left all around dangling. 6. Didn’t dine in so can’t review about the food 7. Large window with a city view and sunlight (rare find in this area) 8. Enough lighting, large mirror in the room, comparatively small but functional bathroom, necessary amenities were presented and refilled 9. Pool is nice and big 10. Very Helpful staff, called rides for us everyday within 5 minutes, helped as requested for other services. Cons: 1. No iron and iron board in the room as default option 2. Plenty of TV channels but mostly news and sports channels, only two options for kids and a few movie and documentary/lifestyle channels. No music channel. My kid felt bored. 3. Location, service and amenities- no complaints rather outstanding. But price seems a little higher for rooms if compared to other similar hotels nearby. 4. Bed mattress was too soft. Won’t bother you unless you’ve back problems like neck pain, spondylitis or backpain or used to ergonomic sleeping materials or is prone to body aches due to sleeping posture. Overall we’re super happy with their hospitality. Our 4 nights stay was great. Hope to return to this one sometime soon as Bangkok is a frequent destination for me.

name: Boss Suites Nana
detail: I haven't stayed in several hotels in Bangkok anyway, but these were the main features that I was looking for in a hotel. 1) Clean and fresh looking 2) Free fast wifi 3) Good breakfast 4) Friendly staff 5) Good location where it's happening for a Solo traveler like me. Boss suites has it all. It is just the best and is not too pricey. I wouldn't call it a 4 star but it is very clean and well maintained. Since it is a new hotel, the interior, decor etc are really attractive and well planned ( like the see through bathroom just in case u have one of those special guests :). It is still a good hotel for couples and families but not the location) The price through agoda was $41 as advertised but it will be $49 before checkout. That's Agoda not Boss suites. Most of the staff can speak fairly good English and extremely friendly. My experiences with the friendly staff are too many in the two days that I've stayed. There is not one improvement that I can suggest for this hotel and that is not an exaggeration. This definitely is value for money. You can rely on the staff for numerous things like free Tuk-Tuk (They got one for me even after hours), help with getting a cab, help with your room and facilities and also suggestions on going around in Bangkok at the reception. And ya, for all those fun loving, crazy young travelers like me , the hotel offers VIP massages for about 500 Baht. They are all professional masseurs but you can take the massage a litte further if you like to :)

name: Ruamchitt Plaza Hotel
detail: OK, it is rare to have a hotel in bangkok where smoking is allowed and it was quite a stay for us. It was very quiet hotel too so you can sleep well at night. It was not a bad hotel at all. For that price, I think it is all worthwhile. I would give five stars if they gave me bottle water the first day when I checked in, so next time, give me water! LOL... Roberson is nearby and so as all transportation. If you are looking to snack shopping, Roberson can fulfill all your snack needs. There were quite a lot of nice restaurants nearby and across the road as well. And there is an old book store nearby and it was a germ! I would definitely stay in this hotel next time. My suggestion, probably better ventilation before check in, it was quite hot in bangkok with the sun shine directly, no amount of air condition can cool the room down in an instant. Also, better television, it was almost impossible to watch anything, the reception was very bad.

name: The Quarter Saladaeng by UHG
detail: I plan to return to Siri Sathorn before I leave Thailand and will make it a base for future visits to Bangkok. Quiet location, but easy walk to shopping, nightlife, Saladaeng Station and beautiful Lumpini Park. You can get a free shuttle too. All staff were very attentive, helpful and delightful. When my adaptor caused a fuse to blow, repairmen arrived within a couple of minutes of reporting it to recception and it was fixed immediately .Buffet breakfast and lunch were great. Gym is well equipped. But the highlight for me was my deluxe room, which was very spacious and comfortable and had a kitchenette as well. I got an excellent deal, which made it extremely good value for money. I visited friends in a much pricier Bangkok hotel and came away feeling I had made the better choice. I will certainly recommend Siri Sathorn to other visitors to Bangkok.

name: ibis Bangkok Sukhumvit 4
detail: a very very very very very good hotel ibis nana is a very good hotel and comforts us like staying at my own home when we are staying at ibis nana, it is the world cup 2010.i ask the front desk staff can we watch world cup in the lobby television, the staff immediately says yes and tell us when the world cup is show on live, he will help to switch the television to the channel of the live world cup. that moment i felt that i just stay in a very warm home. also, the staff called jojoe is a hardworking staff. he has a good memory and know us well and treat us like his family members.he guided us the route to the famous big shopping tesco lotus and the naraya bag shop. he also help us to save money and guide us to have sightseeing on the bangkok view by tell us to take bts train instead of take taxi. he just like a master of the family. i hope this positive feedback to ibis nana will not make them proud. i hope they will serve the customers as same as before or better with some tiny things like in a family. i am sure that the next time i travel to bangkok, the hotel in bangkok i choose must be ibis nana.

name: Rambuttri Village Hotel
detail: My favorite hotel in Bangkok at economy prices. While this is not the cheapest hotel around Khao San rd it offers the best value for money and still quite inexpensive. It is very clean and comfortable and the staff performance has improved significantly with years. While it doesn't have it's own restourant, it is located inside a small village of shops and has all the conveniences at hand. Roof top pool is a nice touch.
